```text
   341→            />
   342→          </div>
   343→        </DrawerContent>
   344→      </Drawer>
   345→    </div>
   346→  )
   347→}
   348→
   349→export function EditorBlock({
   350→  block,
   351→  inlineComments,
   352→  currentUser,
   353→  onAddComment,
   354→  onAddInlineReply,
   355→}: EditorBlockProps) {
   356→  const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false)
   357→  const [isDrawerOpen, setIsDrawerOpen] = useState(false)
   358→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
   359→  const hasComments = block.comments.length > 0
   360→
   361→  return (
   362→    <div
   363→      className="group relative"
   364→      onMouseEnter={() => setIsHovered(true)}
   365→      onMouseLeave={() => setIsHovered(false)}
   366→    >
   367→      <div className="flex items-start gap-0">
   368→        {/* Document content */}
   369→        <div
   370→          className={cn(
   371→            "flex-1 rounded-md px-2 py-1.5 transition-colors duration-150",
   372→            "pr-10 md:pr-2", // Extra padding on mobile for comment button
   373→            (isDrawerOpen || (isHovered && hasComments)) && "bg-comment-highlight",
   374→            hasComments && !isDrawerOpen && !isHovered && "hover:bg-comment-highlight/50"
   375→          )}
   376→        >
   377→          <BlockContent
   378→            block={block}
   379→            inlineComments={inlineComments}
   380→            currentUser={currentUser}
   381→            onAddInlineReply={onAddInlineReply}
   382→          />
   383→        </div>
   384→
   385→        {/* Comment indicator / action */}
   386→        {isMobile ? (
   387→          (hasComments || isHovered) && (
   388→            <MobileCommentAction
   389→              block={block}
   390→              hasComments={hasComments}
   391→              currentUser={currentUser}
   392→              onAddComment={onAddComment}
   393→              isHighlighted={isDrawerOpen}
   394→              onOpenChange={setIsDrawerOpen}
   395→            />
   396→          )
   397→        ) : (
   398→          <DesktopCommentAction
   399→            block={block}
   400→            hasComments={hasComments}
   401→            isHovered={isHovered}
   402→            currentUser={currentUser}
   403→            onAddComment={onAddComment}
   404→          />
   405→        )}
   406→      </div>
   407→    </div>
   408→  )
   409→}
```

 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/sheet/Sheet.tsx`

```text
     1→import { atom, useStore } from 'jotai'
     2→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren, ReactNode } from 'react'
     3→import * as React from 'react'
     4→import { useEffect, useImperativeHandle, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     5→import { Drawer } from 'vaul'
     6→
     7→import { SheetContext } from './context'
     8→
     9→export interface PresentSheetProps {
    10→  content: ReactNode | FC
    11→  open?: boolean
    12→  onOpenChange?: (value: boolean) => void
    13→  title?: ReactNode
    14→  zIndex?: number
    15→  dismissible?: boolean
    16→  defaultOpen?: boolean
    17→
    18→  triggerAsChild?: boolean
    19→}
    20→
    21→export const sheetStackAtom = atom([] as HTMLDivElement[])
    22→
    23→export type SheetRef = {
    24→  dismiss: () => void
    25→}
    26→
    27→export const PresentSheet = ({
    28→  ref,
    29→  ...props
    30→}: PropsWithChildren<PresentSheetProps> & {
    31→  ref?: React.RefObject<SheetRef | null>
    32→}) => {
    33→  const {
    34→    content,
    35→    children,
    36→    zIndex = 1000,
    37→    title,
    38→    dismissible = true,
    39→    defaultOpen,
    40→    triggerAsChild,
    41→  } = props
    42→
    43→  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(props.open ?? defaultOpen)
    44→
    45→  useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    46→    dismiss: () => {
    47→      setIsOpen(false)
    48→    },
    49→  }))
    50→
    51→  const nextRootProps = useMemo(() => {
    52→    const nextProps = {
    53→      onOpenChange: setIsOpen,
    54→    } as any
    55→    if (isOpen !== undefined) {
    56→      nextProps.open = isOpen
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    if (props.onOpenChange !== undefined) {
    60→      nextProps.onOpenChange = (v: boolean) => {
    61→        setIsOpen(v)
    62→        props.onOpenChange?.(v)
    63→      }
    64→    }
    65→
    66→    return nextProps
    67→  }, [props, isOpen, setIsOpen])
    68→
    69→  useEffect(() => {
    70→    if (props.open !== undefined) {
    71→      setIsOpen(props.open)
    72→    }
    73→  }, [props.open])
    74→  const [holderRef, setHolderRef] = useState<HTMLDivElement | null>()
    75→  const store = useStore()
    76→
    77→  useEffect(() => {
    78→    const holder = holderRef
    79→    if (!holder) return
    80→    store.set(sheetStackAtom, (p) => p.concat(holder))
    81→
    82→    return () => {
    83→      store.set(sheetStackAtom, (p) => p.filter((item) => item !== holder))
    84→    }
    85→  }, [holderRef, store])
    86→
    87→  const { Root } = Drawer
    88→
    89→  const overlayZIndex = zIndex - 1
    90→  const contentZIndex = zIndex
    91→
    92→  return (
    93→    <Root dismissible={dismissible} {...nextRootProps}>
    94→      {!!children && (
    95→        <Drawer.Trigger asChild={triggerAsChild}>{children}</Drawer.Trigger>
    96→      )}
    97→      <Drawer.Portal>
    98→        <Drawer.Content
    99→          style={{
   100→            zIndex: contentZIndex,
   101→          }}
   102→          className="fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 flex max-h-[calc(100svh-5rem)] flex-col rounded-t-[10px] bg-base-100 p-4"
   103→        >
   104→          {dismissible && (
   105→            <div className="mx-auto mb-8 h-1.5 w-12 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-zinc-300 dark:bg-neutral-800" />
   106→          )}
   107→
   108→          {title && (
   109→            <Drawer.Title className="-mt-4 mb-4 flex justify-center text-lg font-medium">
   110→              {title}
   111→            </Drawer.Title>
   112→          )}
   113→
   114→          <SheetContext
   115→            value={useMemo(
   116→              () => ({
   117→                dismiss() {
   118→                  setIsOpen(false)
   119→                },
   120→              }),
   121→              [setIsOpen],
   122→            )}
   123→          >
   124→            {typeof content === 'function'
   125→              ? React.createElement(content)
   126→              : content}
   127→          </SheetContext>
   128→          <div ref={setHolderRef} />
   129→        </Drawer.Content>
   130→        <Drawer.Overlay
   131→          className="fixed inset-0 bg-neutral-800/40"
   132→          style={{
   133→            zIndex: overlayZIndex,
   134→          }}
   135→        />
   136→      </Drawer.Portal>
   137→    </Root>
   138→  )
   139→}
   140→
```

```text
   123→
   124→export function CommentBlockGutter({
   125→  containerRef,
   126→  blockInfos,
   127→  comments,
   128→  refId,
   129→}: CommentBlockGutterProps) {
   130→  const commentsByBlock = useMemo(() => {
   131→    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor[]>()
   132→    for (const c of comments) {
   133→      const blockId = c.anchor?.blockId
   134→      if (blockId) {
   135→        const arr = map.get(blockId) || []
   136→        arr.push(c)
   137→        map.set(blockId, arr)
   138→      }
   139→    }
   140→    return map
   141→  }, [comments])
   142→
   143→  const [blockPositions, setBlockPositions] = useState<Map<number, number>>(
   144→    () => new Map(),
   145→  )
   146→
   147→  useEffect(() => {
   148→    const container = containerRef.current
   149→    if (!container) return
   150→    const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
   151→    if (!contentEl) return
   152→
   153→    const updatePositions = () => {
   154→      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
   155→      const positions = new Map<number, number>()
   156→      for (let i = 0; i < contentEl.children.length; i++) {
   157→        const child = contentEl.children[i] as HTMLElement
   158→        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
   159→        positions.set(i, rect.top - containerRect.top)
   160→      }
   161→      setBlockPositions(new Map(positions))
   162→    }
   163→
   164→    updatePositions()
   165→    const observer = new ResizeObserver(updatePositions)
   166→    observer.observe(contentEl)
   167→
   168→    return () => observer.disconnect()
   169→  }, [containerRef, blockInfos])
   170→
   171→  const [hoverIndex, setHoverIndex] = useState(-1)
   172→
   173→  const handleMouseMove = useCallback(
   174→    (e: MouseEvent) => {
   175→      const container = containerRef.current
   176→      if (!container) return
   177→      const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
   178→      if (!contentEl) return
   179→
   180→      for (let i = 0; i < contentEl.children.length; i++) {
   181→        const child = contentEl.children[i] as HTMLElement
   182→        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
   183→        if (e.clientY >= rect.top && e.clientY <= rect.bottom) {
   184→          setHoverIndex(i)
   185→          return
   186→        }
   187→      }
   188→      setHoverIndex(-1)
   189→    },
   190→    [containerRef],
   191→  )
   192→
   193→  const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {
   194→    setHoverIndex(-1)
   195→  }, [])
   196→
   197→  useEffect(() => {
   198→    const container = containerRef.current
   199→    if (!container) return
   200→
   201→    container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
   202→    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
   203→    return () => {
   204→      container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
   205→      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
   206→    }
   207→  }, [containerRef, handleMouseMove, handleMouseLeave])
   208→
   209→  const [activeBlockId, setActiveBlockId] = useState<string | null>(null)
   210→  const prevActiveRef = useRef<string | null>(null)
   211→
   212→  useEffect(() => {
   213→    const container = containerRef.current
   214→    if (!container) return
   215→    const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
   216→    if (!contentEl) return
   217→
   218→    if (prevActiveRef.current) {
   219→      const prevIdx = blockInfos.findIndex(
   220→        (b) => b.blockId === prevActiveRef.current,
   221→      )
   222→      if (prevIdx !== -1) {
   223→        contentEl.children[prevIdx]?.classList.remove('comment-block-active')
   224→      }
   225→    }
   226→
   227→    if (activeBlockId) {
   228→      const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === activeBlockId)
   229→      if (idx !== -1) {
   230→        contentEl.children[idx]?.classList.add('comment-block-active')
   231→      }
   232→    }
   233→
   234→    prevActiveRef.current = activeBlockId
   235→  }, [activeBlockId, containerRef, blockInfos])
   236→
   237→  useEffect(() => {
   238→    const container = containerRef.current
   239→    return () => {
   240→      if (!container) return
   241→      const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
   242→      if (!contentEl) return
   243→      for (const child of contentEl.children) {
   244→        child.classList.remove('comment-block-active')
   245→      }
   246→    }
   247→  }, [containerRef])
   248→
   249→  const gutterItems = useMemo(() => {
   250→    const items: {
   251→      blockIndex: number
   252→      blockId: string
   253→      comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
   254→      isGhost: boolean
   255→    }[] = []
   256→
   257→    for (const [blockId, blockComments] of commentsByBlock) {
   258→      const blockIdx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === blockId)
   259→      if (blockIdx !== -1) {
   260→        items.push({
   261→          blockIndex: blockIdx,
   262→          blockId,
   263→          comments: blockComments,
   264→          isGhost: false,
   265→        })
   266→      }
   267→    }
   268→
   269→    if (hoverIndex !== -1) {
   270→      const info = blockInfos[hoverIndex]
   271→      if (info?.blockId && !commentsByBlock.has(info.blockId)) {
   272→        items.push({
   273→          blockIndex: hoverIndex,
   274→          blockId: info.blockId,
   275→          comments: [],
   276→          isGhost: true,
   277→        })
   278→      }
   279→    }
   280→
   281→    return items
   282→  }, [commentsByBlock, blockInfos, hoverIndex])
   283→
   284→  return (
   285→    <div className="absolute top-0 bottom-0 -right-14 hidden w-12 lg:block">
   286→      {gutterItems.map((item) => {
   287→        const top = blockPositions.get(item.blockIndex)
   288→        if (top === undefined) return null
   289→
   290→        return (
   291→          <GutterItem
   292→            key={item.blockId}
   293→            blockIndex={item.blockIndex}
   294→            blockComments={item.comments}
   295→            blockInfos={blockInfos}
   296→            refId={refId}
   297→            top={top}
   298→            isHovered={hoverIndex === item.blockIndex}
   299→            onOpen={() => setActiveBlockId(item.blockId)}
   300→            onClose={() => setActiveBlockId(null)}
   301→          />
   302→        )
   303→      })}
   304→    </div>
   305→  )
   306→}
   307→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>

```tsx
'use client'

import type { CommentModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
import { Avatar } from '~/components/ui/avatar'
import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
import { PresentSheet } from '~/components/ui/sheet'

import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
import { buildBlockAnchorFromIndex } from './anchor-utils'
import { CommentBlockThread } from './CommentBlockThread'
import type { BlockAnchor, CommentAnchor } from './types'

type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }

interface CommentBlockGutterProps {
  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
  refId: string
}

function AvatarStack({
  comments,
  size = 22,
}: {
  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
  size?: number
}) {
  const uniqueAvatars = useMemo(() => {
    const seen = new Set<string>()
    const result: { avatar?: string; author: string }[] = []
    for (const c of comments) {
      const key = c.avatar || c.author
      if (!seen.has(key)) {
        seen.add(key)
        result.push({ avatar: c.avatar, author: c.author })
      }
    }
    return result.slice(0, 3)
  }, [comments])

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center -space-x-1.5">
      {uniqueAvatars.map((u) => (
        <Avatar
          key={u.avatar || u.author}
          shadow={false}
          imageUrl={u.avatar}
          text={u.author}
          size={size}
          radius="full"
          className="rounded-full ring-2 ring-white dark:ring-zinc-900"
        />
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

function DesktopGutterItem({
  blockIndex,
  blockComments,
  blockInfos,
  refId,
  top,
  isHovered,
  onOpen,
  onClose,
}: {
  blockIndex: number
  blockComments: CommentWithAnchor[]
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
  refId: string
  top: number
  isHovered: boolean
  onOpen: () => void
  onClose: () => void
}) {
  const hasComments = blockComments.length > 0
  const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, blockIndex)

  if (!anchor) return null

  const triggerEl = hasComments ? (
    <button
      type="button"
      className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-1 rounded-full py-0.5 pl-0.5 pr-1.5 transition-colors hover:bg-zinc-100 dark:hover:bg-zinc-800"
    >
      <AvatarStack comments={blockComments} />
      <span className="ml-0.5 text-[11px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
        {blockComments.length}
      </span>
    </button>
  ) : (
    <button
      type="button"
      className={`flex size-7 cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground transition-all hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-foreground dark:hover:bg-zinc-800 ${
        isHovered ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'
      }`}
    >
      <i className="icon-[mingcute--comment-plus-line] text-[15px]" />
    </button>
  )

  return (
    <div
      className="absolute left-0 flex items-start"
      style={{ top: `${top}px` }}
    >
      <FloatPopover
        triggerElement={triggerEl}
        trigger="click"
        placement="right-start"
        offset={8}
        headless
        popoverClassNames="rounded-xl border border-zinc-200/80 bg-white shadow-lg dark:border-zinc-700/80 dark:bg-zinc-900"
        onOpen={onOpen}
        onClose={onClose}
      >
        <CommentBlockThread
          comments={blockComments}
          refId={refId}
          blockAnchor={anchor as BlockAnchor}
        />
      </FloatPopover>
    </div>
  )
}

function MobileGutterItem({
  blockIndex,
  blockComments,
  blockInfos,
  refId,
  top,
  onOpen,
  onClose,
}: {
  blockIndex: number
  blockComments: CommentWithAnchor[]
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
  refId: string
  top: number
  onOpen: () => void
  onClose: () => void
}) {
  const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, blockIndex)

  if (!anchor) return null

  return (
    <div
      className="absolute -right-1 flex items-start"
      style={{ top: `${top}px` }}
    >
      <PresentSheet
        triggerAsChild
        title="评论"
        content={
          <CommentBlockThread
            comments={blockComments}
            refId={refId}
            blockAnchor={anchor as BlockAnchor}
          />
        }
        onOpenChange={(open) => {
          if (open) onOpen()
          else onClose()
        }}
      >
        <button
          type="button"
          className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-0.5 rounded-full border border-zinc-200/80 bg-white/90 py-0.5 pl-0.5 pr-1.5 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm dark:border-zinc-700/80 dark:bg-zinc-900/90"
        >
          <AvatarStack comments={blockComments} size={20} />
          <span className="text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
            {blockComments.length}
          </span>
        </button>
      </PresentSheet>
    </div>
  )
}

export function CommentBlockGutter({
  containerRef,
  blockInfos,
  comments,
  refId,
}: CommentBlockGutterProps) {
  const isMobile = useIsMobile()

  const commentsByBlock = useMemo(() => {
    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor[]>()
    for (const c of comments) {
      const blockId = c.anchor?.blockId
      if (blockId) {
        const arr = map.get(blockId) || []
        arr.push(c)
        map.set(blockId, arr)
      }
    }
    return map
  }, [comments])

  const [blockPositions, setBlockPositions] = useState<Map<number, number>>(
    () => new Map(),
  )

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return
    const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
    if (!contentEl) return

    const updatePositions = () => {
      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
      const positions = new Map<number, number>()
      for (let i = 0; i < contentEl.children.length; i++) {
        const child = contentEl.children[i] as HTMLElement
        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
        positions.set(i, rect.top - containerRect.top)
      }
      setBlockPositions(new Map(positions))
    }

    updatePositions()
    const observer = new ResizeObserver(updatePositions)
    observer.observe(contentEl)

    return () => observer.disconnect()
  }, [containerRef, blockInfos])

  const [hoverIndex, setHoverIndex] = useState(-1)

  const handleMouseMove = useCallback(
    (e: MouseEvent) => {
      const container = containerRef.current
      if (!container) return
      const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
      if (!contentEl) return

      for (let i = 0; i < contentEl.children.length; i++) {
        const child = contentEl.children[i] as HTMLElement
        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
        if (e.clientY >= rect.top && e.clientY <= rect.bottom) {
          setHoverIndex(i)
          return
        }
      }
      setHoverIndex(-1)
    },
    [containerRef],
  )

  const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {
    setHoverIndex(-1)
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isMobile) return

    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return

    container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    return () => {
      container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    }
  }, [containerRef, handleMouseMove, handleMouseLeave, isMobile])

  const [activeBlockId, setActiveBlockId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const prevActiveRef = useRef<string | null>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return
    const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
    if (!contentEl) return

    if (prevActiveRef.current) {
      const prevIdx = blockInfos.findIndex(
        (b) => b.blockId === prevActiveRef.current,
      )
      if (prevIdx !== -1) {
        contentEl.children[prevIdx]?.classList.remove('comment-block-active')
      }
    }

    if (activeBlockId) {
      const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === activeBlockId)
      if (idx !== -1) {
        contentEl.children[idx]?.classList.add('comment-block-active')
      }
    }

    prevActiveRef.current = activeBlockId
  }, [activeBlockId, containerRef, blockInfos])

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    return () => {
      if (!container) return
      const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
      if (!contentEl) return
      for (const child of contentEl.children) {
        child.classList.remove('comment-block-active')
      }
    }
  }, [containerRef])

  const gutterItems = useMemo(() => {
    const items: {
      blockIndex: number
      blockId: string
      comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
      isGhost: boolean
    }[] = []

    for (const [blockId, blockComments] of commentsByBlock) {
      const blockIdx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === blockId)
      if (blockIdx !== -1) {
        items.push({
          blockIndex: blockIdx,
          blockId,
          comments: blockComments,
          isGhost: false,
        })
      }
    }

    if (!isMobile && hoverIndex !== -1) {
      const info = blockInfos[hoverIndex]
      if (info?.blockId && !commentsByBlock.has(info.blockId)) {
        items.push({
          blockIndex: hoverIndex,
          blockId: info.blockId,
          comments: [],
          isGhost: true,
        })
      }
    }

    return items
  }, [commentsByBlock, blockInfos, hoverIndex, isMobile])

  // Mobile: only show blocks with comments, inline at right edge
  if (isMobile) {
    const commentItems = gutterItems.filter((item) => !item.isGhost)
    if (commentItems.length === 0) return null

    return (
      <div className="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none">
        {commentItems.map((item) => {
          const top = blockPositions.get(item.blockIndex)
          if (top === undefined) return null

          return (
            <div key={item.blockId} className="pointer-events-auto">
              <MobileGutterItem
                blockIndex={item.blockIndex}
                blockComments={item.comments}
                blockInfos={blockInfos}
                refId={refId}
                top={top}
                onOpen={() => setActiveBlockId(item.blockId)}
                onClose={() => setActiveBlockId(null)}
              />
            </div>
          )
        })}
      </div>
    )
  }

  // Desktop: absolute gutter to the right
  return (
    <div className="absolute top-0 bottom-0 -right-14 hidden w-12 lg:block">
      {gutterItems.map((item) => {
        const top = blockPositions.get(item.blockIndex)
        if (top === undefined) return null

        return (
          <DesktopGutterItem
            key={item.blockId}
            blockIndex={item.blockIndex}
            blockComments={item.comments}
            blockInfos={blockInfos}
            refId={refId}
            top={top}
            isHovered={hoverIndex === item.blockIndex}
            onOpen={() => setActiveBlockId(item.blockId)}
            onClose={() => setActiveBlockId(null)}
          />
        )
      })}
    </div>
  )
}

```

```text
    68→    })
    69→    onClose?.()
    70→  }, [queryClient, refId, onClose])
    71→
    72→  return (
    73→    <div className="w-72">
    74→      {comments.length > 0 && (
    75→        <div className="max-h-72 overflow-y-auto py-1">
    76→          {comments.map((comment) => (
    77→            <ThreadComment key={comment.id} comment={comment} />
    78→          ))}
    79→        </div>
    80→      )}
    81→      <div className={comments.length > 0 ? 'border-t border-border' : ''}>
    82→        <CommentBoxRoot
    83→          refId={refId}
    84→          anchor={blockAnchor}
    85→          afterSubmit={handleAfterSubmit}
    86→          className="p-2"
    87→        />
    88→      </div>
    89→    </div>
    90→  )
    91→}
    92→
```

```tsx
'use client'

import { atom, useAtomValue, useSetAtom } from 'jotai'
import * as React from 'react'
import { useLayoutEffect } from 'react'
import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'

import { useIsClient } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-client'

const rightSideElementAtom = atom<null | HTMLDivElement>(null)
export const LayoutRightSideProvider: Component = ({ className }) => {
  const setElement = useSetAtom(rightSideElementAtom)
  const divRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    setElement(divRef.current)
    return () => {
      // GC
      setElement(null)
    }
  }, [])

  return <div ref={divRef} className={className} />
}

export const LayoutRightSidePortal: Component = ({ children }) => {
  const rightSideElement = useAtomValue(rightSideElementAtom)

  const isClient = useIsClient()
  if (!isClient) return null

  if (!rightSideElement) return null

  return createPortal(children, rightSideElement)
}

```

```text
    14→import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
    15→import { extractBlockInfos } from './anchor-utils'
    16→import { CommentAnchorHighlight } from './CommentAnchorHighlight'
    17→import { CommentBlockGutter } from './CommentBlockGutter'
    18→import type { CommentAnchor } from './types'
    19→
    20→type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
    21→type CommentsQueryData = InfiniteData<
    22→  PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>
    23→>
    24→
    25→function useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    26→  const { data } = useQuery({
    27→    queryKey: ['comments', refId, 'anchors'],
    28→    queryFn: async () => {
    29→      const data = await apiClient.comment.proxy
    30→        .ref(refId)
    31→        .get<PaginateResult<CommentWithAnchor & { ref: string }>>({
    32→          params: { hasAnchor: 'true', size: 50 },
    33→        })
    34→
    35→      return data
    36→    },
    37→  })
    38→
    39→  return useMemo(() => {
    40→    if (!data) return []
    41→    return data.data
    42→  }, [data])
    43→}
    44→
    45→function useCachedCommentsData(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    46→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    47→  const queryKey = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
    48→  const queryCache = queryClient.getQueryCache()
    49→
    50→  const data = useSyncExternalStore(
    51→    (onStoreChange) => {
    52→      const unsubscribe = queryCache.subscribe((event) => {
    53→        if (
    54→          event.type === 'updated' &&
    55→          event.query.queryHash === JSON.stringify(queryKey)
    56→        ) {
    57→          onStoreChange()
    58→        }
    59→      })
    60→      return unsubscribe
    61→    },
    62→    () => queryClient.getQueryData<CommentsQueryData>(queryKey),
    63→    () => null as CommentsQueryData | null,
    64→  )
    65→
    66→  return useMemo(() => {
    67→    if (!data) return []
    68→    return data.pages.flatMap((page) => page.data)
    69→  }, [data])
    70→}
    71→
    72→function useMergedAnchorComments(refId: string): CommentWithAnchor[] {
    73→  const eagerComments = useAnchorCommentsQuery(refId)
    74→  const cachedComments = useCachedCommentsData(refId)
    75→
    76→  return useMemo(() => {
    77→    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor>()
    78→    for (const c of eagerComments) map.set(c.id, c)
    79→    for (const c of cachedComments) {
    80→      if ((c as CommentWithAnchor).anchor) map.set(c.id, c)
    81→    }
    82→    return [...map.values()]
    83→  }, [eagerComments, cachedComments])
    84→}
    85→
    86→export function LexicalCommentWrapper({
    87→  content,
    88→  refId,
    89→  title: _title,

    93→  refId: string
    94→  title: string
    95→}>) {
    96→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    97→  const blockInfos = useMemo<BlockInfo[]>(

    99→    [content],
   100→  )

   121→        blockInfos={blockInfos}
```

```text
    53→      }
    54→      if (ref.current?.contains(e.target as Node)) return
    55→      setShow(false)
    56→    }
    57→    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler)
    58→    document.addEventListener('mouseup', handler)
    59→    return () => {

   132→            animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
   133→            exit={{

   135→              opacity: 0,
   136→            }}
   137→          >
   138→            {canCopy && (

   140→                <MotionButtonBase
   141→                  data-event="selection-comment"
   142→                  className="rounded-md px-2 py-1 hover:bg-slate-100/80 dark:hover:bg-zinc-900/90"
   143→                  onMouseUp={stopPropagation}

   149→                >
   150→                  {t('selection_copy')}

   154→            )}
   155→            {canComment && (

   159→                onClick={() => {
```

   - Creating `CommentBlockThread` component

2. **First Implementation**: I created:
   - `CommentBlockGutter.tsx` - new file with avatar stacks, ghost buttons, FloatPopover
   - `CommentBlockThread.tsx` - new file with thread panel
   - Updated `LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx` - replaced CommentBlockButton with CommentBlockGutter
   - Added `.comment-block-active` CSS to `layer.css`

3. **User feedback #1**: "note 下不要增加 rightside 的 pl，而是修改 LexicalCommentWrapper div 增加一点 pr" + UI bugs with container sizes in screenshots
   - Reverted `LayoutRightSideProvider` changes
   - Changed approach: added `lg:pr-14` to LexicalCommentWrapper container
   - Fixed CommentBlockThread width: `w-72` → `w-80 min-w-0 overflow-hidden`
   - Removed `commentGutterVisibleAtom`

4. **User feedback #2**: "太分散了，应该缩小一点 padding，然后 gutter 左对齐。更加紧凑一点"
   - Changed `lg:pr-14` → `lg:pr-8`
   - Changed gutter from `-right-14 w-12` → `right-0 w-8`

5. **User feedback #3**: Reuse CommentBlockThread for lexical selection comments + ghost button not visible
   - Renamed `blockAnchor: BlockAnchor` → `anchor: CommentAnchor` in CommentBlockThread
   - Fixed ghost button: removed `blockId` requirement, allowed blocks without IDs
   - Updated WithArticleSelectionAction to use CommentBlockThread for lexical anchor comments

6. **Current issue (most recent)**: User reports that clicking the ghost button shows a panel on the right, but when moving the mouse toward/into the panel, everything disappears. This is because:
   - The FloatPopover uses `trigger="click"` but the container also has mouseMove/mouseLeave handlers
   - When mouse moves away from the content area toward the popover, `hoverIndex` resets to -1
   - This removes the ghost item from `gutterItems`, which unmounts the FloatPopover
   - The popover disappears because its parent element is removed from the DOM

The root cause: ghost items are ephemeral - they only exist in `gutterItems` while `hoverIndex` matches. When the mouse leaves the content area to enter the popover, the ghost item is removed, destroying the popover.

The user also mentions the `anchor` variable - noting that `buildBlockAnchorFromIndex` returns null for blocks without blockId, and the current code has `isDisabled={!anchor}` which prevents the popover from opening for those blocks.
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Implement a Comment Block Gutter UI system for a blog platform (Shiroi) that shows comment avatars + counts on the right side of article content blocks
   - Ghost "+" button appears on hover for blocks without comments
   - Clicking opens a FloatPopover with a CommentBlockThread (comments list + input)
   - Mobile responsive: avatar stacks inline with PresentSheet (bottom drawer)
   - Reuse CommentBlockThread for lexical text-selection (划词) comments instead of the old CommentModal
   - Fix ghost button visibility issues
   - **Most recent**: Fix bug where the popover panel disappears when moving mouse from the trigger button into the popover panel

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Monorepo: pnpm + Turborepo, Next.js App Router
   - State: Jotai atoms, TanStack Query
   - UI: Tailwind CSS, FloatPopover (floating-ui), PresentSheet (vaul drawer)
   - Lexical editor content with block-level comment anchors (`BlockAnchor`, `RangeAnchor`, `CommentAnchor`)
   - `CommentAnchor = BlockAnchor | RangeAnchor` (from `@haklex/rich-editor`)
   - `.rich-content` is the class on the rendered lexical content div (from `RichRenderer`)
   - Block IDs come from lexical node metadata (`child.$.blockId`); many blocks may have empty `blockId: ''`

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockGutter.tsx`** (NEW - core component)
     - Contains `AvatarStack`, `DesktopGutterItem`, `MobileGutterItem`, `CommentBlockGutter`
     - Groups comments by blockId, tracks block positions via ResizeObserver
     - Hover tracking via mousemove/mouseleave on containerRef
     - Desktop: absolute gutter at `right-0 w-8` inside `lg:pr-8` padding area
     - Mobile: inline avatar stacks with PresentSheet
     - **CURRENT BUG**: Ghost items are ephemeral in `gutterItems` - they only exist while `hoverIndex` matches. When mouse leaves content toward popover, `hoverIndex` resets to -1, ghost item removed from DOM, popover destroyed.
     - Key problematic code pattern:
     ```tsx
     // Ghost items depend on hoverIndex - removed when hover changes
     if (!isMobile && hoverIndex !== -1) {
       const info = blockInfos[hoverIndex]
       if (info && !commentsByBlock.has(info.blockId || `__idx_${hoverIndex}`)) {
         items.push({ blockIndex: hoverIndex, blockId: info.blockId || `__idx_${hoverIndex}`, comments: [], isGhost: true })
       }
     }
     ```
     - DesktopGutterItem uses FloatPopover with `trigger="click"` and `isDisabled={!anchor}`
     - The mouseLeave handler on container sets `setHoverIndex(-1)` which destroys ghost items

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockThread.tsx`** (NEW - thread panel)
     - Props: `comments: CommentWithAnchor[], refId: string, anchor: CommentAnchor, onClose?: () => void`
     - Shows comment list + CommentBoxRoot with `compact` prop
     - Width: `w-[400px] min-w-0 overflow-hidden`
     - Auto-focuses contenteditable after 50ms
     - After submit: invalidates `['comments', refId, 'anchors']` query

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/LexicalCommentWrapper.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Replaced `CommentBlockButton` import with `CommentBlockGutter`
     - Passes `comments` data to gutter
     - Container: `className="group/comment-block relative lg:pr-8"`
     - `title` prop renamed to `_title` (unused after gutter replacement)

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added `CommentBlockThread` import
     - When anchor exists (lexical): uses `CommentBlockThread` in modal instead of `CommentModal`
     - When no anchor (non-lexical): falls back to `CommentModal` with quoted text

   - **`apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/Root.tsx`** (MODIFIED by user/linter)
     - Added `compact` prop support

   - **`apps/web/src/styles/layer.css`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added `.comment-block-active` class with accent color background highlight

   - **`apps/web/src/providers/shared/LayoutRightSideProvider.tsx`** (REVERTED to original)
     - User explicitly said not to modify this; use pr on LexicalCommentWrapper instead

   - **`apps/web/src/atoms/comment-anchor.ts`** (CLEANED)
     - Only contains `pendingCommentAnchorAtom`; `commentGutterVisibleAtom` was removed

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Lint: `>= 0` vs `!== -1`**: ESLint `unicorn/consistent-existence-index-check` required `!== -1` for findIndex checks
   - **Lint: lazy useState**: `useState(new Map())` → `useState(() => new Map())`
   - **Lint: ref in cleanup**: Captured `containerRef.current` before cleanup function
   - **Lint: prefer-destructuring**: `const avatar = comment.avatar` → `const { avatar, author } = comment`

   - **User: "太分散了"**: Gutter was too far from content (`-right-14`). Fixed: `right-0 w-8` with `lg:pr-8`

   - **BlockAnchor type too narrow**: Changed `blockAnchor: BlockAnchor` → `anchor: CommentAnchor` to support both block and range anchors

5. Problem Solving:
   - Solved: Layout integration (gutter positioning relative to content and TOC columns)
   - Solved: Mobile responsive (PresentSheet for mobile, FloatPopover for desktop)
   - Solved: Ghost button visibility for blocks without blockId

   The user reported: "有问题，我现在点一下这个 button，然后右侧会出来一个 panel，但是在我移过、移进这个 panel 的过程中，整体就消失了"

   The root cause: Ghost items in `gutterItems` are ephemeral - they depend on `hoverIndex` matching. When the user clicks the ghost button, the FloatPopover opens. But when the mouse moves toward the popover (which is rendered via portal outside the container), the `mouseleave` or `mousemove` handler on the container fires, setting `hoverIndex` to -1. This removes the ghost item from `gutterItems`, which unmounts the `DesktopGutterItem` component, which destroys the FloatPopover.

   The fix needs to: keep the ghost item alive in `gutterItems` while its popover is open. One approach: track which blockId has an open popover (already have `activeBlockId` state via `onOpen`/`onClose` callbacks), and preserve ghost items in `gutterItems` when their popover is active.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Fix the ghost item lifecycle in `CommentBlockGutter.tsx`. The `gutterItems` memo needs to preserve ghost items when their popover is open. The `activeBlockId` state already tracks which popover is open. Modify the `gutterItems` useMemo to include the active ghost item even when `hoverIndex` changes:

   ```tsx
   // In the gutterItems useMemo, after the hoverIndex ghost logic:
   // Also preserve active ghost item (popover is open)
   if (activeBlockId && !commentsByBlock.has(activeBlockId) && 
       !items.some(i => i.blockId === activeBlockId)) {
     const blockIdx = blockInfos.findIndex(b => b.blockId === activeBlockId) 
     // or find by __idx_ pattern
     // ... push the item to keep popover alive
   }
   ```

   Also need to suppress hoverIndex reset while a popover is open (don't set hoverIndex to -1 during mouseleave if activeBlockId is set).

   The user reported: "有问题，我现在点一下这个 button，然后右侧会出来一个 panel，但是在我移过、移进这个 panel 的过程中，整体就消失了"

   The root cause: Ghost items in `gutterItems` are ephemeral - they depend on `hoverIndex` matching. When the user clicks the ghost button, the FloatPopover opens. But when the mouse moves toward the popover (which is rendered via portal outside the container), the `mouseleave` or `mousemove` handler on the container fires, setting `hoverIndex` to -1. This removes the ghost item from `gutterItems`, which unmounts the `DesktopGutterItem` component, which destroys the FloatPopover.

   The fix needs to: keep the ghost item alive in `gutterItems` while its popover is open. One approach: track which blockId has an open popover (already have `activeBlockId` state via `onOpen`/`onClose` callbacks), and preserve ghost items in `gutterItems` when their popover is active.

```text
   304→
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I understand the issue clearly. Two fixes needed:

```text
   225→        positions.set(i, rect.top - containerRect.top)

   271→    return () => {

   273→      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)

   277→  const [activeBlockId, setActiveBlockId] = useState<string | null>(null)

   283→      const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === id)
   284→      if (idx !== -1) return idx
   285→      if (id.startsWith('__idx_')) {

   297→    if (!contentEl) return

   300→    if (prevIdx !== -1) {

   302→    }
   303→
   304→    const idx = resolveBlockIndex(activeBlockId)
   305→    if (idx !== -1) {

   311→

   313→    const container = containerRef.current

   332→    for (const [blockId, blockComments] of commentsByBlock) {

   362→        if (blockIdx === -1 && activeBlockId.startsWith('__idx_')) {

   370→            isGhost: true,
   371→          })
   372→        }
   373→      }
   374→    }
   375→
   376→    return items
   377→  }, [commentsByBlock, blockInfos, hoverIndex, isMobile, activeBlockId])
   378→
   379→  // Mobile: only show blocks with comments, inline at right edge

   381→    const commentItems = gutterItems.filter((item) => !item.isGhost)
   382→    if (commentItems.length === 0) return null
   383→

   393→                blockIndex={item.blockIndex}
   394→                blockComments={item.comments}
   395→                blockInfos={blockInfos}
   396→                refId={refId}
   397→                top={top}
   398→                onOpen={() => setActiveBlockId(item.blockId)}
   399→                onClose={() => setActiveBlockId(null)}
   400→              />
   401→            </div>
   402→          )
   403→        })}
   404→      </div>
   405→    )
   406→  }
   407→
   408→  // Desktop: absolute gutter to the right
   409→  return (
   410→    <div className="absolute top-0 bottom-0 right-0 hidden w-8 lg:block z-10">
   411→      {gutterItems.map((item) => {

   413→        if (top === undefined) return null
   414→

   418→            blockIndex={item.blockIndex}
   419→            blockComments={item.comments}
   420→            blockInfos={blockInfos}
   421→            refId={refId}
   422→            top={top}
   423→            isHovered={hoverIndex === item.blockIndex || activeBlockId === item.blockId}
   424→            onOpen={() => setActiveBlockId(item.blockId)}
   425→            onClose={() => setActiveBlockId(null)}

   427→        )
```

```tsx
'use client'

import type { CommentModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import { useIsMobile } from '~/atoms/hooks/viewport'
import { Avatar } from '~/components/ui/avatar'
import { PresentSheet } from '~/components/ui/sheet'

import type { BlockInfo } from './anchor-utils'
import { buildBlockAnchorFromIndex } from './anchor-utils'
import { CommentBlockThread } from './CommentBlockThread'
import type { CommentAnchor } from './types'

type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }

interface CommentBlockGutterProps {
  containerRef: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
  refId: string
}

function AvatarStack({
  comments,
  size = 22,
}: {
  comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
  size?: number
}) {
  const uniqueAvatars = useMemo(() => {
    const seen = new Set<string>()
    const result: { avatar?: string; author: string }[] = []
    for (const c of comments) {
      const key = c.avatar || c.author
      if (!seen.has(key)) {
        seen.add(key)
        result.push({ avatar: c.avatar, author: c.author })
      }
    }
    return result.slice(0, 3)
  }, [comments])

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center -space-x-1.5">
      {uniqueAvatars.map((u) => (
        <Avatar
          key={u.avatar || u.author}
          shadow={false}
          imageUrl={u.avatar}
          text={u.author}
          size={size}
          radius="full"
          className="rounded-full ring-2 ring-white dark:ring-zinc-900"
        />
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

function DesktopGutterTrigger({
  blockComments,
  top,
  isHovered,
  isActive,
  onClick,
}: {
  blockComments: CommentWithAnchor[]
  top: number
  isHovered: boolean
  isActive: boolean
  onClick: () => void
}) {
  const hasComments = blockComments.length > 0

  return (
    <div
      className="absolute left-0 flex items-start"
      style={{ top: `${top}px` }}
    >
      {hasComments ? (
        <button
          type="button"
          className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-1 rounded-full py-0.5 pl-0.5 pr-1.5 transition-colors hover:bg-zinc-100 dark:hover:bg-zinc-800"
          onClick={onClick}
        >
          <AvatarStack comments={blockComments} />
          <span className="ml-0.5 text-[11px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
            {blockComments.length}
          </span>
        </button>
      ) : (
        <button
          type="button"
          className={`flex size-7 cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground transition-all hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-foreground dark:hover:bg-zinc-800 ${
            isHovered || isActive ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'
          }`}
          onClick={onClick}
        >
          <i className="i-mingcute-comment-line text-[15px]" />
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

function MobileGutterItem({
  blockIndex,
  blockComments,
  blockInfos,
  refId,
  top,
  onOpen,
  onClose,
}: {
  blockIndex: number
  blockComments: CommentWithAnchor[]
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
  refId: string
  top: number
  onOpen: () => void
  onClose: () => void
}) {
  const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, blockIndex)

  if (!anchor) return null

  return (
    <div
      className="absolute -right-1 flex items-start"
      style={{ top: `${top}px` }}
    >
      <PresentSheet
        triggerAsChild
        title="评论"
        content={
          <CommentBlockThread
            comments={blockComments}
            refId={refId}
            anchor={anchor!}
          />
        }
        onOpenChange={(open) => {
          if (open) onOpen()
          else onClose()
        }}
      >
        <button
          type="button"
          className="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-0.5 rounded-full border border-zinc-200/80 bg-white/90 py-0.5 pl-0.5 pr-1.5 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm dark:border-zinc-700/80 dark:bg-zinc-900/90"
        >
          <AvatarStack comments={blockComments} size={20} />
          <span className="text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
            {blockComments.length}
          </span>
        </button>
      </PresentSheet>
    </div>
  )
}

interface ActivePanel {
  blockIndex: number
  blockId: string
}

export function CommentBlockGutter({
  containerRef,
  blockInfos,
  comments,
  refId,
}: CommentBlockGutterProps) {
  const isMobile = useIsMobile()

  const commentsByBlock = useMemo(() => {
    const map = new Map<string, CommentWithAnchor[]>()
    for (const c of comments) {
      const blockId = c.anchor?.blockId
      if (blockId) {
        const arr = map.get(blockId) || []
        arr.push(c)
        map.set(blockId, arr)
      }
    }
    return map
  }, [comments])

  const [blockPositions, setBlockPositions] = useState<Map<number, number>>(
    () => new Map(),
  )

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return
    const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
    if (!contentEl) return

    const updatePositions = () => {
      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
      const positions = new Map<number, number>()
      for (let i = 0; i < contentEl.children.length; i++) {
        const child = contentEl.children[i] as HTMLElement
        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
        positions.set(i, rect.top - containerRect.top)
      }
      setBlockPositions(new Map(positions))
    }

    updatePositions()
    const observer = new ResizeObserver(updatePositions)
    observer.observe(contentEl)

    return () => observer.disconnect()
  }, [containerRef, blockInfos])

  const [hoverIndex, setHoverIndex] = useState(-1)

  const handleMouseMove = useCallback(
    (e: MouseEvent) => {
      const container = containerRef.current
      if (!container) return
      const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
      if (!contentEl) return

      for (let i = 0; i < contentEl.children.length; i++) {
        const child = contentEl.children[i] as HTMLElement
        const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect()
        if (e.clientY >= rect.top && e.clientY < rect.bottom) {
          setHoverIndex(i)
          return
        }
      }
      setHoverIndex(-1)
    },
    [containerRef],
  )

  const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(() => {
    setHoverIndex(-1)
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isMobile) return

    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return

    container.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    return () => {
      container.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    }
  }, [containerRef, handleMouseMove, handleMouseLeave, isMobile])

  // Panel state — decoupled from gutter items
  const [activePanel, setActivePanel] = useState<ActivePanel | null>(null)
  const prevActiveRef = useRef<string | null>(null)
  const panelRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const gutterRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  const activeBlockId = activePanel?.blockId ?? null

  const resolveBlockIndex = useCallback(
    (id: string | null): number => {
      if (!id) return -1
      const idx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === id)
      if (idx !== -1) return idx
      if (id.startsWith('__idx_')) {
        return Number.parseInt(id.slice(6), 10)
      }
      return -1
    },
    [blockInfos],
  )

  // Block highlight
  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return
    const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
    if (!contentEl) return

    const prevIdx = resolveBlockIndex(prevActiveRef.current)
    if (prevIdx !== -1) {
      contentEl.children[prevIdx]?.classList.remove('comment-block-active')
    }

    const idx = resolveBlockIndex(activeBlockId)
    if (idx !== -1) {
      contentEl.children[idx]?.classList.add('comment-block-active')
    }

    prevActiveRef.current = activeBlockId
  }, [activeBlockId, containerRef, resolveBlockIndex])

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    return () => {
      if (!container) return
      const contentEl = container.querySelector('.rich-content')
      if (!contentEl) return
      for (const child of contentEl.children) {
        child.classList.remove('comment-block-active')
      }
    }
  }, [containerRef])

  // Click outside panel to close
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!activePanel) return
    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      const target = e.target as Node
      if (panelRef.current?.contains(target)) return
      if (gutterRef.current?.contains(target)) return
      setActivePanel(null)
    }
    const rafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler)
    })
    return () => {
      cancelAnimationFrame(rafId)
      document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler)
    }
  }, [activePanel])

  // Escape to close
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!activePanel) return
    const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') setActivePanel(null)
    }
    document.addEventListener('keydown', handler)
    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handler)
  }, [activePanel])

  const handleGutterClick = useCallback(
    (blockIndex: number, blockId: string) => {
      const anchor = buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, blockIndex)
      if (!anchor) return
      setActivePanel((prev) =>
        prev?.blockId === blockId ? null : { blockIndex, blockId },
      )
    },
    [blockInfos],
  )

  const gutterItems = useMemo(() => {
    const items: {
      blockIndex: number
      blockId: string
      comments: CommentWithAnchor[]
      isGhost: boolean
    }[] = []

    for (const [blockId, blockComments] of commentsByBlock) {
      const blockIdx = blockInfos.findIndex((b) => b.blockId === blockId)
      if (blockIdx !== -1) {
        items.push({
          blockIndex: blockIdx,
          blockId,
          comments: blockComments,
          isGhost: false,
        })
      }
    }

    if (!isMobile && hoverIndex !== -1) {
      const info = blockInfos[hoverIndex]
      if (info && !commentsByBlock.has(info.blockId || `__idx_${hoverIndex}`)) {
        items.push({
          blockIndex: hoverIndex,
          blockId: info.blockId || `__idx_${hoverIndex}`,
          comments: [],
          isGhost: true,
        })
      }
    }

    return items
  }, [commentsByBlock, blockInfos, hoverIndex, isMobile])

  // Mobile: only show blocks with comments
  if (isMobile) {
    const commentItems = gutterItems.filter((item) => !item.isGhost)
    if (commentItems.length === 0) return null

    return (
      <div className="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none">
        {commentItems.map((item) => {
          const top = blockPositions.get(item.blockIndex)
          if (top === undefined) return null

          return (
            <div key={item.blockId} className="pointer-events-auto">
              <MobileGutterItem
                blockIndex={item.blockIndex}
                blockComments={item.comments}
                blockInfos={blockInfos}
                refId={refId}
                top={top}
                onOpen={() =>
                  setActivePanel({
                    blockIndex: item.blockIndex,
                    blockId: item.blockId,
                  })
                }
                onClose={() => setActivePanel(null)}
              />
            </div>
          )
        })}
      </div>
    )
  }

  const panelTop = activePanel
    ? blockPositions.get(activePanel.blockIndex)
    : undefined
  const panelAnchor = activePanel
    ? buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos, activePanel.blockIndex)
    : null
  const panelComments = activePanel
    ? commentsByBlock.get(activePanel.blockId) || []
    : []

  return (
    <div
      ref={gutterRef}
      className="absolute top-0 bottom-0 right-0 hidden w-8 lg:block z-10"
    >
      {gutterItems.map((item) => {
        const top = blockPositions.get(item.blockIndex)
        if (top === undefined) return null

        return (
          <DesktopGutterTrigger
            key={item.blockId}
            blockComments={item.comments}
            top={top}
            isHovered={hoverIndex === item.blockIndex}
            isActive={activeBlockId === item.blockId}
            onClick={() => handleGutterClick(item.blockIndex, item.blockId)}
          />
        )
      })}

      {activePanel && panelAnchor && panelTop !== undefined && (
        <div
          ref={panelRef}
          className="absolute left-full ml-2 z-20 rounded-xl border border-zinc-200/80 bg-white shadow-lg overflow-hidden dark:border-zinc-700/80 dark:bg-zinc-900"
          style={{ top: `${panelTop}px` }}
        >
          <CommentBlockThread
            comments={panelComments}
            refId={refId}
            anchor={panelAnchor}
            onClose={() => setActivePanel(null)}
          />
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

```
